name: mastodon-is-my-blog-eleventy
description: A themed Eleventy export of long Mastodon posts and self-reply threads.
title: Mastodon is my Blog

scripts.clean: node -e "const fs=require('node:fs'); const path=require('node:path'); const target=path.resolve(process.cwd(),'..','docs'); fs.rmSync(target,{recursive:true,force:true}); fs.mkdirSync(target,{recursive:true});"
scripts.build:styles: node -e "const fs=require('node:fs'); fs.mkdirSync('src/assets/generated',{recursive:true});" && sass --load-path=src/assets/sass --load-path=node_modules --no-source-map --style=compressed src/assets/sass/critical.scss src/assets/generated/critical.css && sass --load-path=src/assets/sass --load-path=node_modules --no-source-map --style=compressed src/assets/sass/not-critical.scss src/assets/generated/not-critical.css
scripts.build: npm run export:data && npm run clean && npm run build:styles && eleventy
scripts.serve: npm run export:data && npm run build:styles && eleventy --serve
